items.title_en: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
items.title_zh: 内塔尼亚胡命令军队“大力攻击”黎巴嫩真主党

items.title_en: I brought my husband back for his funeral as a hologram
items.title_zh: 我把我丈夫带回来参加他的葬礼作为全息图

items.desc_zh: 结婚近 60 年后，帕姆想在丈夫比尔的葬礼上用全息图来纪念他。

items.title_en: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
items.title_zh: 特朗普取消美国特使前往巴基斯坦就伊朗战争进行会谈的行程
items.desc_en: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗早些时候表示，没有计划与史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳率领的美国代表团直接会面。

items.title_en: Orbán steps down from Hungarian parliament after landslide defeat
items.title_zh: 欧尔班以压倒性失败从匈牙利议会辞职
items.desc_en: The outgoing prime minister will not take up his seat after leading his party back into opposition.
items.desc_zh: 即将卸任的总理在带领他的政党重新成为反对党后将不会就任。

items.title_en: U.S. imposes sanctions on Chinese 'teapot' refinery for buying Iranian oil
items.title_zh: 美国因购买伊朗石油而对中国“茶壶”炼油厂实施制裁
items.desc_en: The Office of Foreign Assets Control said it imposed sanctions on about 40 shipping companies and vessels that operate as part of Iran's shadow fleet.
items.desc_zh: 美国外国资产控制办公室表示，它对大约 40 家属于伊朗影子船队的航运公司和船只实施了制裁。

items.title_en: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
items.title_zh: 墨西哥称坠机事件中丧生的美国特工不允许在那里执行任务
items.desc_en: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，两名为中央情报局工作的美国人在墨西哥领导的摧毁一个药物实验室的行动后死于车祸。

items.title_en: Rights groups critical as Venezuela prisoner release scheme 'coming to an end'
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉囚犯释放计划“即将结束”，人权组织提出批评
items.desc_en: More than 500 political prisoners are thought to still be in jail, despite the releases since the amnesty law was brought in.
items.desc_zh: 尽管自大赦法实施以来，已有 500 多名政治犯被释放，但据信仍有 500 多名政治犯被关押在监狱中。

items.title_en: AI talent war: Software industry is a new target as top executives jump ship to OpenAI
items.title_zh: AI人才大战：高管跳槽OpenAI，软件行业成新目标
items.desc_en: Software giants are seeing their worst stock performance in years on fears of AI disruption. Now they have a new problem.
items.desc_zh: 由于担心人工智能的颠覆，软件巨头的股票表现出现了多年来最差的表现。现在他们遇到了新的问题。

items.title_en: We tried out xAI's Grok chatbot while driving a Tesla in NYC. Here's what happened.
items.title_zh: 我们在纽约驾驶特斯拉时尝试了 xAI 的 Grok 聊天机器人。事情是这样的。

items.title_en: This little-known ETF is up over 600% amid U.S.-Iran war, a better trade than oil or energy stocks
items.title_zh: 这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争期间上涨了600%以上，比石油或能源股更好的交易
items.desc_en: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has surged more than 600% since the beginning of the year, vastly outperforming crude oil and energy stocks.
items.desc_zh: 自今年年初以来，Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) 已飙升逾 600%，远远优于原油和能源股。

items.title_en: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
items.title_zh: 约旦河西岸的巴勒斯坦人和加沙的一些巴勒斯坦人在地方选举中投票
items.desc_en: Local elections are held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.
items.desc_zh: 地方选举在被占领的约旦河西岸和加沙一座城市举行，但哈马斯和其他团体没有参加。

items.title_en: Mali army says armed groups launch coordinated attacks across country
items.title_zh: 马里军方称武装团体在全国范围内发动协调袭击
items.desc_en: Witnesses report explosions and sustained gunfire near a military base outside the capital, Bamako.
items.desc_zh: 目击者报告称，首都巴马科郊外的一个军事基地附近发生爆炸和持续枪击事件。

items.title_en: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯对乌克兰的重大袭击造成七人死亡
items.desc_en: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.
items.desc_zh: 第聂伯罗市受灾最严重，官员称，一栋住宅楼遭到袭击，造成四人死亡。

items.title_en: Iran says no meeting with U.S. negotiators planned in Pakistan, with Trump envoys due to head to Islamabad
items.title_zh: 伊朗表示没有计划在巴基斯坦与美国谈判代表会面，特朗普特使将前往伊斯兰堡
items.desc_en: U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are expected to arrive in Islamabad on Saturday.
items.desc_zh: 美国特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和贾里德·库什纳预计将于周六抵达伊斯兰堡。

items.title_en: Dozens of sloths died before opening of Sloth World attraction in Florida
items.title_zh: 佛罗里达州树懒世界景点开放前数十只树懒死亡
items.desc_en: Many died due to conditions at a Florida warehouse where they'd been shipped, while others arrived from South America dead, authorities say.
items.desc_zh: 当局称，许多人因运送货物的佛罗里达仓库的状况而死亡，还有一些人从南美洲抵达时死亡。

items.title_en: The viral manifesto of 'anti-woke' tech boss with NHS and defence contracts
items.title_zh: “反觉醒”科技老板与 NHS 和国防合同的病毒宣言
items.desc_en: The boss of the controversial tech company with UK government contracts published a 22-point plan on the future of the West.
items.desc_zh: 这家与英国政府签订合同、备受争议的科技公司的老板发表了一份关于西方未来的 22 点计划。

items.title_en: Thousands at risk after multi-million dollar Everest flood warning system left to rust
items.title_zh: 耗资数百万美元的珠穆朗玛峰洪水预警系统生锈，数千人面临危险
items.desc_en: The flood warning system at Imja glacial lake has not been maintained since 2016, fearful locals tell BBC.
items.desc_zh: 恐惧的当地人告诉 BBC，伊姆贾冰川湖的洪水预警系统自 2016 年以来就没有维护过。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss 'deeply sorry' for not telling police of mass shooting suspect's account
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板对没有告诉警方大规模枪击嫌疑人的账户深感抱歉
items.desc_en: Sam Altman on Thursday wrote a brief letter of apology to the people of Tumbler Ridge, Canada in the wake of a January mass shooting.
items.desc_zh: 周四，山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 在一月份发生大规模枪击事件后，向加拿大塔布勒岭 (Tumbler Ridge) 的人民写了一封简短的道歉信。

items.title_en: US to allow firing squads, gas, and electrocution for federal executions
items.title_zh: 美国允许联邦执行行刑队、毒气和电刑
items.desc_en: In a memo, the Department of Justice says the move will "strengthen" the death penalty and deter crime.
items.desc_zh: 美国司法部在一份备忘录中表示，此举将“加强”死刑并威慑犯罪。

items.title_en: Claude Connectors
items.title_zh: Claude Connectors
items.desc_en: New connectors in Claude for everyday life
items.desc_zh: Claude 为日常生活设计的新型连接器

items.title_en: GPT-5.5 by OpenAI
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 by OpenAI
items.desc_en: OpenAI's smartest and most intuitive to use model yet
items.desc_zh: OpenAI 迄今为止最智能、最直观的使用模型

items.title_en: Will he stay or will he go? With criminal probe over, Fed Chair Powell faces big decision
items.title_zh: 他会留下还是会走？随着刑事调查结束，美联储主席鲍威尔面临重大决定
items.desc_en: The decision could have important ramifications for policymaking at an especially delicate time.
items.desc_zh: 在这个特别微妙的时刻，这一决定可能会对政策制定产生重要影响。

items.title_en: DOJ says it will use firing squads, electrocution again for federal executions
items.title_zh: 司法部表示将再次使用行刑队和电刑进行联邦处决
items.desc_en: As the Trump administration resumes capital punishment, Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche instructed the Bureau of Prisons to modify its execution protocol.
items.desc_zh: 随着特朗普政府恢复死刑，代理司法部长托德·布兰奇指示监狱管理局修改其执行协议。

items.title_en: Pica
items.title_zh: Pica
items.desc_en: Fully native app for managing your fonts on MacOS
items.desc_zh: 用于在 MacOS 上管理字体的完全本机应用程序

items.title_en: US justice department drops probe into Fed chairman Jerome Powell
items.title_zh: 美国司法部撤销对美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump had accused Powell of improper cost overruns in renovating the Fed's building.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统指责鲍威尔在翻修美联储大楼时成本超支。

items.title_en: UK cyber chiefs say it's time to ditch passwords for passkeys - what are they?
items.title_zh: 英国网络负责人表示，是时候放弃密码而改用万能钥匙了——万能钥匙是什么？
items.desc_en: Passwords have long been the default way we secure accounts online but the NCSC has said passkeys are a better option.
items.desc_zh: 长期以来，密码一直是我们保护在线帐户安全的默认方式，但 NCSC 表示，密钥是更好的选择。

items.title_en: Nato says US cannot suspend Spain from alliance, after reported Pentagon email
items.title_zh: 五角大楼电子邮件报道后，北约表示美国不能暂停西班牙的联盟关系
items.desc_en: An internal Pentagon email reportedly outlines options to punish allies over a perceived lack of support for Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，五角大楼的一封内部电子邮件概述了因盟友缺乏对伊朗战争支持而惩罚盟友的选项。

items.title_en: UK biobank data incident caused by 'a few bad apples', boss says
items.title_zh: 老板称英国生物银行数据事件是由“一些坏苹果”引起的
items.desc_en: Professor Sir Rory Collins said he was "angry" and "upset" about the incident, as both the bank's boss and a participant.
items.desc_zh: 教授罗里·柯林斯爵士表示，作为银行的老板和参与者，他对这一事件感到“愤怒”和“不安”。

items.desc_en: Compare LLMs on your data, measure, and pick the best.
items.desc_zh: 比较法学硕士的数据、衡量并选择最佳的。

items.title_en: From scientist to silk farmer: India's silk industry renewal
items.title_zh: 从科学家到丝农：印度丝绸业的复兴
items.desc_en: Silk production is an increasingly high-tech business in India.
items.desc_zh: 在印度，丝绸生产是一个日益高科技的行业。

items.title_en: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
items.title_zh: 白宫备忘录称中国公司大规模盗窃人工智能
items.desc_en: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.desc_zh: Michael Kratsios 的一份备忘录称，主要是中国的公司错误地借鉴了美国的人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows
items.title_zh: Meta 表示，随着人工智能支出的增长，它将裁员 8,000 人
items.desc_en: The cuts, which employees had been expecting for weeks, will be Meta's largest layoff since 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。

items.title_en: UK Biobank health data listed for sale in China, government confirms
items.title_zh: 政府确认英国生物银行健康数据在中国出售
items.desc_en: The government said medical data of 500,000 people was affected but no personally identifiable information had been made available.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，50 万人的医疗数据受到影响，但尚未提供任何个人身份信息。

items.title_zh: Google Workspace Intelligence
items.desc_en: AI that understands and powers your Workspace
items.desc_zh: AI 能够理解并为您的工作空间提供支持

items.title_en: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
items.title_zh: Xbox 降低 Game Pass 价格，但结束《使命召唤》第一天的访问
items.desc_en: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
